purpose: compact machine-readable proof for one remote source, one local edited site, and one live drift witness

push_pipeline.preflight: binds the persisted pull base to the live remote identity and a short-lived push session
push_pipeline.snapshot_hash_listing: returns the live remote comparison set for planning only
push_pipeline.dry_run_plan_upload: uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence and returns a receipt, not a lock
push_pipeline.mutation_batch_apply: revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary, separate from dry-run
push_pipeline.journal_inspect: reads durable evidence without authorizing mutation
push_pipeline.recovery_inspect: starts with inspect and classifies finish, rollback, retry, or block without mutation
push_pipeline.recovery: allows mutating repair only when the journal row, lease fence, and fresh live hashes prove the action

test_topology.remote_base: one source site that seeds the persisted pull base
test_topology.local_edited: one imported local site with user edits
test_topology.remote_changed: the same remote site after independent drift
test_topology.runner: the only actor allowed to run the push protocol
drift_proof: remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity observed at different times
exporter/importer establish the immutable pull base package
dry-run and apply remain separate remote calls
apply revalidates fresh live evidence before every batch and again at the storage boundary
dry-run and apply remain separate remote operations
journal inspection stays read-only before inspect-first recovery can mutate
browser-visible inspection uses the sandbox-provided 8080 ingress through a local-only proxy
exporter/importer establish the immutable pull base package
remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity observed at different times
dry-run and apply remain separate remote calls

pull_to_push_mapping.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_to_push_mapping.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance
pull_to_push_mapping.preflight: binds that persisted base package to the live remote identity and a short-lived session
pull_to_push_mapping.snapshot_hash_listing: collects live comparison evidence for planning only
pull_to_push_mapping.dry_run_plan_upload: uploads the canonical plan as eligibility evidence only
pull_to_push_mapping.mutation_batch_apply: revalidates live evidence before every batch and at the storage boundary
pull_to_push_mapping.journal_inspect: reads durable evidence before any recovery choice
pull_to_push_mapping.recovery: starts with inspect and only mutates when the journal plus fresh live hashes prove the action

apply_revalidation.at_storage_boundary: fresh live hashes plus storage-guard proof
rejected_if: the remote changed after the dry-run receipt
the journal cannot prove a safe finish, rollback, or block

remote_liveness.snapshot_hash_listing: planning evidence only and never write authority
remote_liveness.dry_run: eligibility evidence only and never a lock
remote_liveness.apply: a separate remote stage that revalidates before every batch and at the storage boundary
remote_liveness.recovery: inspect-first and mutating only when journal evidence plus fresh live hashes prove the action

proof: journal rows carry claim ownership, generation, and lease expiry
mutating recovery is fenced until inspect reads the journal row and fresh live hashes
storage-boundary checks still run after the journal fence is satisfied

recovery_inspect.authorization: read-only evidence reader that never authorizes mutation by itself

remote_snapshot_hash_listing: cursorable live hash evidence used for planning only and never treated as write authority

roles.remote_base: one remote source site that seeds the persisted pull base
roles.local_edited: one imported local site with user edits
roles.remote_changed: the same remote site observed later after independent drift
roles.runner: the only process allowed to preflight, plan, upload, inspect, revalidate, and recover

pull_pipeline.exporter: scans the merge base and coverage evidence
pull_pipeline.importer: persists the base package as immutable provenance

recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
runner is the only caller that can compare, upload, inspect, and recover

push preflight, dry-run, apply, journal, and recovery use the same route names as Docker
recovery inspect happens before any mutating repair
runner uses the same route names and keeps browser-visible inspection on local-only 8080 ingress

remote_changed.role: same remote source site later in time

proof: remote-base and remote-changed are the same remote identity observed at different times

auth_session_fencing.preflight: mints one short-lived session bound to one remote identity and one persisted pull base
auth_session_fencing.recovery_inspect: must happen before any mutating repair
auth_session_fencing.required_auth_floor: at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage

required_invariants: pull exporter/importer establish the immutable base package before push

dry-run is a receipt, not a lock

recovery must begin with inspect before any mutating repair

dry-run and apply are separate remote operations even when the same runner executes both
